zh.Newport, Newport, Rhode Island, Colonial: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德紐波特紐波特
zh.lifeSummary: Thomas Tooley於1585年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 高威可隆福特。他於1612年與Rebecca Lynn Eyre在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1684年4月2日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德紐波特享年99歲。

zh-hans.Newport, Newport, Rhode Island, Colonial: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德紐波特紐波特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Thomas Tooley于1585年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 高威可隆福特。他于1612年与Rebecca Lynn Eyre在英国英格兰林可爾史爾结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1684年4月2日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德紐波特享年99岁。

nameMeanings.name: Tooley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Norfolk and Lincolnshire): variant of   Tolley  .

variants.name: Towle
meanings: from Middle English Tolle or Tole, usually a pet form of Anglo-Norman Torald, a well-used personal name by the Normans in Normandy and England and ultimately from Old Norse Thóraldr(Thórr the god Thor + vald ‘power, rule’). Middle English Tole was also an Anglicized form of Old Norse Tóli (see Tooley ) and could alternatively have derived from Old English Tola. Compare Tolson .

variants.name: Tull
meanings: English (Hampshire and Berkshire): from the Middle English personal name Tulle (Old English Tulla, perhaps a form of Old Norse Tóli; compare Tooley ).
South German: nickname for a stubborn man, Tull.

South German (Tüll): nickname for someone who was patient, from Middle High German dult ‘patience’; or from a personal name formed with the same word; or from Middle High German tult, dult ‘fair, festival’ (Bavarian Dult). The surname Tüll is rare in Austria and virtually non-existing in Germany.

variants.name: O'Toole
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Caitlin, Eamonn, Eoin, Kelan, Kieran, Michael Patrick, Niall, Patrick James, Peadar, Siobhan.

Irish (Dublin): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Tuathail ‘descendant of Tuathal’, an ancient Celtic personal name based on tuath ‘people’ + val- ‘might, rule’. Compare Toland . This name has also been erroneously associated with Gaelic tuile ‘flood’ and therefore occasionally Anglicized as Flood .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.description: Accession of James I. Surrender of Hugh O'Neill. Enforcement of English Law in Ireland.

historicEvents.title: Providence Founded
historicEvents.description: In 1636 Providence is founded as a settlement for Rhode Island by Roger Williams

Great Catholic-Gaelic rebellion for return of lands, later joined by Old English Catholics in Ireland. Under leadership of Irish chieftain, Rory O'More, conspiracy was formed to seize Dublin and expel the English. English settlers were driven out of Ulster. Catholics hold 59% of land in Ireland.
Over 6,000 Irish boys and women sold as slaves since England gained control of Jamaica.

en.lifeSummary: Thomas Tooley was born in 1585, in Clonfert, County Galway, Ireland. He married Rebecca Lynn Eyre in 1612, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 2 April 1684, in Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, at the age of 99.

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Tooley(은)는 1585년 아일랜드 카운티 갈웨이 클론퍼트에서 태어났다. 그는 1612년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 Rebecca Lynn Eyre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1684년 4월 2일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 뉴포트에서 99세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Thomas Tooley родился в 1585 г. в местности клонфирт, коунти галвеи, Ирландия. Он женился на женщине по имени Rebecca Lynn Eyre в 1612 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 2 апреля 1684 г. в местности нюпорт, род исланд, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 99 лет.
